payload.reason: Victor updated Builder Console task status with grounded evidence and governance approval.

request.taskTitle: Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
request.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?

groundedContext.query: What should happen next with the governed automation task "Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity" in phase "UOR Content-Addressed Identity Migration"?
semanticNodeLabels: Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
Introduce canonical UOR address type and BLAKE3 content addressing
Content-addressed identity uses the designated BLAKE3 pipeline.
Rewire memory, tier, and graph structures onto UOR identity
Core memory and tier structures key on UOR identity.
Existing SHA-based integrity paths remain backward-compatible during migration.

before.title: Run governed migration from current provenance to UOR-backed identity
before.description: Upgrade existing memory artifacts into the UOR identity model with explicit audits, rollback affordances, and conflict reporting so the migration itself is governed and reversible.
acceptance: Existing memory artifacts can be migrated into the UOR identity model.
Migration writes an auditable report of converted, skipped, and contested artifacts.
Rollback path exists if identity conflicts or provenance gaps are discovered.
